name: Password
description: Password displays strength indicator for password fields.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Value of the component.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value for the input when not controlled by `modelValue`.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute for the element, typically used in form submissions.

props.name: promptLabel
props.description: Text to prompt password entry. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: mediumRegex
props.description: Regex for a medium level password.

props.name: strongRegex
props.description: Regex for a strong level password.

props.name: weakLabel
props.description: Text for a weak password. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: mediumLabel
props.description: Text for a medium password. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: strongLabel
props.description: Text for a strong password. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: feedback
props.description: Whether to show the strength indicator or not.

props.name: appendTo
props.description: A valid query selector or an HTMLElement to specify where the overlay gets attached.

props.name: toggleMask
props.description: Whether to show an icon to display the password as plain text.

props.name: maskIcon
props.description: Icon to hide displaying the password as plain text.

props.name: unmaskIcon
props.description: Icon to show displaying the password as plain text.

props.name: showClear
props.description: When enabled, a clear icon is displayed to clear the value.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the component.

props.name: invalid
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should have invalid state style.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: variant
props.description: Specifies the input variant of the component.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input.

props.name: required
props.description: When present, it specifies that an input field must be filled out before submitting the form.

props.name: fluid
props.description: Spans 100% width of the container when enabled.

props.name: autofocus
props.description: When present, it specifies that an input element should automatically get focus when the page loads.

props.name: inputId
props.description: Identifier of the underlying input element.

props.name: inputStyle
props.description: Inline style of the input field.

props.name: inputClass
props.description: Style class of the input field.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLInputElement to the focusable input element inside the component.

props.name: panelId
props.description: Identifier of the underlying overlay panel element.

props.name: panelClass
props.description: Style class of the overlay panel.

props.name: panelStyle
props.description: Inline style of the overlay panel.

props.name: panelProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLDivElement to the overlay panel inside the component.

props.name: overlayId
props.description: Identifier of the underlying overlay element.

props.name: overlayClass
props.description: Style class of the overlay.

props.name: overlayStyle
props.description: Inline style of the overlay.

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLDivElement to the overlay inside the component.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Establishes relationships between the component and label(s) where its value should be one or more element IDs.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Establishes a string value that labels the component.

props.name: formControl
props.description: Form control object, typically used for handling validation and form state.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: value-change
events.description: Emitted when the value changes in uncontrolled mode.

events.name: change
events.description: Callback to invoke on value change.

slots.name: hideicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Mask icon click event */ toggleCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: maskicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Mask icon click event */ toggleCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: showicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Unmask icon click event */ toggleCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: unmaskicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Unmask icon click event */ toggleCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: clearicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Clear icon click function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ clearCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
